layout_and_spacing.padding: p-6 or p-8 for major containers
layout_and_spacing.borders: border-collapse style layout, 1px solid #111111 for all card boundaries
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data. Asymmetric tension.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-none (0px) strictly everywhere. No soft corners.

buttons.primary: bg-[#111111] text-white hover:bg-[#333333] border border-[#111111] transition-all duration-150 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#E53E3E]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#111111] border border-[#111111] hover:bg-[#F7F7F7] transition-all duration-150 rounded-none

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#111111] rounded-none p-6 shadow-none

inputs.default: rounded-none border border-[#111111] bg-white text-[#111111] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#E53E3E]

tables.header: border-b-2 border-[#111111] uppercase text-xs tracking-[0.1em] font-bold text-[#555555] py-4

images.description: Brutalist architectural background for login/registration pages.
Students taking exams for empty states or dashboard greetings.
Government building architectural shot for the admin overview header.

icons_and_libraries.motion: yarn add framer-motion (for micro-interactions and route transitions)
icons_and_libraries.charts: yarn add recharts (for evaluation/attendance data visualization)

main_agent_instructions.1: CRITICAL: The project is strictly JavaScript (.jsx / .js). DO NOT USE TypeScript (.tsx / .ts), despite the user mentioning it. Ensure Shadcn components are initialized in JavaScript.
main_agent_instructions.2: MANDATORY: Install required fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or global CSS: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono.
main_agent_instructions.3: MANDATORY: Customize Shadcn UI heavily to match the Neo-Brutalist/Swiss style: radius: 0 (rounded-none), hard solid black borders, drop shadows are solid offsets (e.g. shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#111111]), not soft blurs.
main_agent_instructions.4: MANDATORY: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex grid layouts (like the dashboard Control Room grid) instead of wrestling with Shadcn layout components. Only use Shadcn for interactive pieces (Select, DatePicker, Dialog, Tabs).
main_agent_instructions.5: MANDATORY: Every key interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based, e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
main_agent_instructions.6: MANDATORY: Ensure high contrast text on all active/hover states. Do NOT rely on Tailwind's default soft colors. If a button is hovered, change text color explicitly to maintain WCAG AA contrast.
main_agent_instructions.7: Do not leave generic empty state placeholders. Use the provided image URLs (like 'empty_state_students') for empty data views.
